market_overview.headline: Markets showing rotation patterns with SPY hitting new highs while tech leads and crypto remains choppy.
market_overview.detail: SPY at record high 699.94 with bullish (unstacked) structure, QQQ in Full Bull mode up 5.79% vs 21W, but BTC remains in Bear Rally above 13W down -4.86% vs 21W. Energy dominates with 100% bull participation while tech services struggles at -58.8% net score.

momentum_themes.headline: Tech Hardware Acceleration & Energy Leadership
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology showing massive momentum with SNDK +61.68% vs 21W leading storage/semiconductor revival. Energy minerals maintain 100% bull participation as Iran tensions drive oil infrastructure concerns.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominance vs Tech Services Weakness

strongest.note: Perfect bull participation as Iran war tensions drive oil infrastructure concerns
Materials benefiting from industrial demand and commodity strength
Tech hardware acceleration led by storage and semiconductor names

weakest.note: Software stocks under pressure despite some mega-cap resilience
Consumer spending concerns weigh on discretionary durables
Complete bearish capture as business services face headwinds

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/software into cyclicals and energy. Energy minerals showing unprecedented unity while tech services faces broad-based selling despite QQQ strength.

items.text: Tech services sector showing 79.4% bear participation despite QQQ Full Bull structure
SPY bullish but unstacked EMAs suggest fragile leadership with crossover risks
BTC bear structure diverging from equity strength may signal risk-off ahead
Only 7 Bull Breakdown signals but deterioration could accelerate quickly

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran conflict escalation dominated with multiple sanctions targeting oil infrastructure while diplomatic efforts continue. SPY hit first record high since war began as markets weighed supply disruption risks against potential deals. Oil-related sectors surged while broader tech remained mixed.

items.text: US sanctions target Iran oil transportation infrastructure, supporting energy sector strength
SPY hits first intraday record high since US-Iran war began, breaking technical resistance
Iran offers Strait of Hormuz shipping corridor proposal, creating diplomatic uncertainty
India urea prices double to $1,000 on Iran war shock, highlighting supply chain impacts
Cruise lines face profit pressure from oil prices and Middle East route disruptions
